panels.name: Failed Login Attempts Over Time
panels.title: Failed Login Attempts - 24H Trend
panels.search: index=* sourcetype="/var/log/auth.log" "Failed password" | timechart count as failed_logins

panels.name: Top Attack Sources by Country
panels.title: Geographic Distribution of Attacks
panels.search: index=* sourcetype="/var/log/auth.log" "Failed password" | iplocation src_ip | geostats count

panels.name: SSH Brute Force Attempts
panels.title: Top Attack Sources (SSH)
panels.search: index=* sourcetype="/var/log/auth.log" "Failed password" | stats count as attempts by src_ip | sort - attempts | head 10

panels.name: Failed vs Successful Logins
panels.title: Authentication Success Rate
panels.search: index=* sourcetype="/var/log/auth.log" ("Failed password" OR "Accepted password") | stats count by status

panels.name: User Authentication Anomalies
panels.title: Users with Abnormal Activity
panels.search: index=* sourcetype="/var/log/auth.log" | stats count as login_attempts by user | where login_attempts > 50
